text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Commendable! You strive toward your dreams
together as one!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Know that I am always behind you cheering your
efforts! Forge ever ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's apparently quite impressed with the way
we're conducting our practice sessions.
